title: Account Password Reset
description: Caller needs help resetting their password and then asks about two-factor authentication.

turns.caller: Hi, I'm locked out of my account and I can't remember my password. Can you help?
Yeah, my email is sarah@example.com. I've been trying for the last hour.
I checked my spam folder already. Still nothing. Should I try a different email?
Okay, one more thing. How do I set up two-factor authentication once I'm back in?
That's really helpful, thank you. I think that's all I needed.
